prompt: Use my photograph to create a cute illustrated chibi sticker-pack. Clean, white background, vertical output with a thick white border. Create diverse cute expressions: sad, laughing, crying, sleepy, surprised, confused, eating, grumpy, cute expressions. Each expression should include cute text, like: Good morning!, On My Way, Whattt?, Huh?, Text Me, I’m reminding you!, Super sleepy, No Way!, Wow!, Approved!, Upset, Achoo!, Angry!, Huh???, Too cute, Walk?
